title: An Ordinance Naming the Three(3) Road Lots Donated by the Heirs of Antonio Digal Bustrillos and Nena Rola Bustrillos to Bagong Los Baños Read 1; Bagong Los Baños Road 2; and Bagong Los Baños Road 3 Containing an Area of Six Thousand Two Hundred Eighty (6,280) Square Meters Located in Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna.
